programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: Can an eco-warrior and a petrolhead beauty salon owner agree to disagree on the environment? And a country-loving Yorkshireman shocks a London-based youth worker to the core.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: More curious couples sex-periment with opening up their relationships. Connor and Kirstie explore having a threesome. Chanice and Richardo face an unexpected issue.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil return for a new series, and in London its double trouble for Kirstie as she helps 67 identical twins Matt and Chris Wickham, who are clubbing together to buy their first home. Their £350,000 is a healthy first-time buyer budget. Phil helps Sam Taylor and his fiancee Krystle Maher, who are desperate to move out of their small rented flat in Deptford and into a home of their own.

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: The chapel will be unliveable for many more months, so Keith and Marj come up with a radical idea to sleep onsite a lot sooner: getting a shipping container in their car park, and transforming it into their first official finished bedroom.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fourth to host in South Wales is doctor Sophie, whos usually vegan, but is serving meat to try and win her guests over. Will it be just what the doctor ordered?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Helen and Carls self-catering glampsite, Peacock Lake, in Nottinghamshire. The hosts feedback has ruffled plenty of feathers throughout the week, so their guests expectations are sky-high.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, renovations give Andrew and Richard sleepless nights. In Spain, things get a little too quiet for Abi and Darren, and Gordon and Shonas dream hangs in the balance.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Andy and Alida are downsizing their house and fulfilling their dream of buying a chalet in the French Alps. Will they find their perfect property in Berkshire and the ski-resort of Morzine?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton revisits Dawn and Steve at their dream townhouse in Mijas Pueblo. Ben Hillman catches up with Graham and Yvonne at their apartment in Alvor in Portugal, and finds out how life just gets better and better for this super-relaxed couple.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This weeks competition is in Huddersfield, where first host, 49-year-old cheeky mum of three, Virginia Houslin, is hoping to wow her guests with her silver-tongued charm and Caribbean home cooking. The night gets off to a good start when Virginias hopes for some flirtatious fun get a boost when she opens the door to the first guest.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its day two in Huddersfield and the turn of Business Development Manager Iyesha Atkins to try to impress her guests with a sophisticated dinner party. She powers through her cooking with no problem, and sets the tone from the start, letting self-styled King of Clubs Tommy Mack know that its her dinner party tonight and that he needs to behave himself.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wedding singer and confident cook Richard Wood has steak on the menu, with a side dish of risk. Rather than ask his guests how theyd like their fillets cooked, he plans to do them, in the words of his singing hero Frank Sinatra, "my way". The starter doesnt go down well, with mum-of-three Virginia Houslin telling Richard she would throw up if she kept eating the dish.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day four in Huddersfield its the turn of self-styled king of clubs, Tommy Mack, to have his shot at winning with a Hollywood Silent Movie themed evening that includes some unique entertainment. Banking on guests low expectations of his cooking, he plans to surprise them with mystery dishes such as Mad Macks Yum Goong and his Trio of 381 Hearts. Tommys starter proves a real talking point.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Kim Connor is trying her hand at an American diner themed menu on the final night in Huddersfield. Sweating over a hot stove isnt glamorous Kims natural domain, but she gets through her cooking by following detailed notes from her Mum. The evening gets off to a good start, with the tension between Virginia and Iyesha seeming to have simmered down since last night, but who will end up winning the prize?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman jets off to Kapparis in eastern Cyprus to help Bill and Sandra find their perfect two-bedroom holiday home for £80,000. Jasmine has five impressive properties to show them.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil visit Aberdeen, helping two sets of house hunters who have relocated to the granite city for work. Helen Barr and Brian Clarence moved from Essex while awaiting the arrival of their first child. Theyve been living in rented accommodation, but with baby number two on the way its time to find a family home. Brians priority is finding a bargain; Helen doesnt want a project.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Ministers Chris and Caroline need some divine intervention with their home in Alnwick. Chris is ready for a change of scenery and a bigger, more user-friendly space, while Caroline loves their home, and particularly their neighbours.

programme.title: Aldi vs MandS: Battle of the Brands
programme.desc: Its posh versus upstart. From cakes to wine, Kate Quilton explores the ultimate British supermarket showdown. This isnt just any supermarket turf war... this is Aldi vs MandS.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Scott is rushed into Queens Medical Centre via an air ambulance after crashing his motorbike at 100mph. And Peter has been crushed by an eight-tonne static caravan.

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: PC Jodie and PC Zoe are called to break up a brawl between neighbours. And veteran officer Emma struggles to identify a child whos found wandering the streets late at night.

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: A dangerous driver tries to flee the scene of a crash. An altercation between housemates needs some police attention. And Petes coppers nose uncovers something unexpected.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Lauren (30) has had a rare cancer called myxoid-liposarcoma since she was eight. Can surgery fix it, finally allowing Lauren to get on with her life?

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Lauren (30) has had a rare cancer called myxoid-liposarcoma since she was eight. Can surgery fix it, finally allowing Lauren to get on with her life?

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Car fanatic John has filled every inch of outdoor space at his home with classic cars, but hes decided to part with some of his beloved collection to fund his retirement. And a rare animal pelt could be the solution to inn owner Carolines problems.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: In Warwickshire Dave Crouch comes to the rescue a tipper truck gets stuck in deep mud on an isolated farm track. And a 26-ton truck breaks down beside the London Eye.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A bin lorry has come off a country lane, its wheels slipping in mud, and a box van trailer with has been uncoupled and left with the front supported solely by its Landing Legs.

programme.title: Entertainment News On 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Winter Road Rescue
programme.desc: Shot over three months, this documentary series follows the snowplough drivers and patrols who work around the clock to make sure the UK does not grind to a halt when winter weather hits. In the Highlands, snowplough teams battle blizzards, ice, flooding and landslides to keep the roads open, whilst across the UK patrols fight snow, gales and icy conditions to reach motorists stranded in the cold.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: An ill wind blows through Worksop when a Ford Focus seemingly fails to stop for Lewis and Rich. The suspected driver is away on his toes, but police dog Quantum follows his nose to an outdoor toilet.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Profiling the work of high-speed police interception units around the country with some of the most dangerous pursuits and shocking footage ever captured. Exploring what it takes to bring order to chaos.

programme.title: El Dorado
programme.desc: Gunslinger Cole Thornton rides into a small town to work for a cattle baron, but quits after learning that his would-be employer wants to drive a family off their land and obtain their water supply. Thornton leaves the situation unresolved, but a chance encounter takes him back to El Dorado, where he joins the sheriff in a range war.

programme.title: Entertainment News On 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: El Dorado
programme.desc: Gunslinger Cole Thornton rides into a small town to work for a cattle baron, but quits after learning that his would-be employer wants to drive a family off their land and obtain their water supply. Thornton leaves the situation unresolved, but a chance encounter takes him back to El Dorado, where he joins the sheriff in a range war.

programme.title: Seven Men From Now
programme.desc: Former sheriff Ben Stride, haunted by the loss of his wife in a Wells fargo robbery, hunts for the seven men responsible for her death - along the way encountering a couple heading west for California, and an outlaw he once arrested.

programme.title: Seven Men From Now
programme.desc: Former sheriff Ben Stride, haunted by the loss of his wife in a Wells fargo robbery, hunts for the seven men responsible for her death - along the way encountering a couple heading west for California, and an outlaw he once arrested.

programme.title: Trucking Heavy
programme.desc: A trio of truckers are moving a 63-tonne train track tamping machine from a siding on the outskirts of Glasgow to a rail yard in Stranraer.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Cops from North and West Yorkshire are cracking down on uninsured drivers whose recklessness is a cost to all of us, raising everyones insurance premiums and killing more than 130 other road users every year.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Interceptor Mick leads a team raiding two flats whose occupants are suspected of producing and selling spice. Duncan is involved in a high-speed pursuit, which ends with tracker dog Tia on the escaping offenders trail.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A runaway driver flees an accident in a decommissioned ambulance, then crashes through a level crossing and ditches his ride on a live railway line. While a chopper tracks the suspect, cops frantically battle to close the railway line.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: The driver of a possible cloned car refuses to come quietly, a woman is suspected of drug driving, and a drink driver is remarkably jolly about getting caught.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Specials
programme.desc: We shadow the teams as they endeavour to solve the problems caused by large and heavy vehicles when they roll, crash, or burn. (Ep1)

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder faces his feelings about the disappearance of his sister after a girl in Iowa mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Trouble on the traction line leaves Craig with endless breakdowns. A driver fights a chronic back injury to keep the trucks moving and a log hauler goes off the road forcing an all-night rescue.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Turbo faces a journey that takes him directly through an area affected by a bush fire. Plus, owner operator Yogi faces the biggest week of his career. But how will he get on?

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: When a driver transporting booze decouples at a lorry park, his trailers landing legs are swallowed by some porous tarmac. The recovery pushes Jordan and Merries skills to the limit.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: When a driver transporting booze decouples at a lorry park, his trailers landing legs are swallowed by some porous tarmac. The recovery pushes Jordan and Merries skills to the limit.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Theres an emergency in East London when a 25-ton truck hits a railway bridge. And Buzz needs to co-ordinate a multi-agency taskforce when a refrigerated lorry catches fire on the A42.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team tackle a lairy drunk, a runaway knifeman, a suspected drug dealer, an overturned trailer full of cows and a ruptured gas main.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A stick of dynamite is brought into Carlisles main police station, a gun is spotted in a city-centre bar and Duncan receives a shock when a cyclist who has been crushed and trapped under a car turns out to be someone he knows.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Cumbrias elite interceptor teams are called out to deal with a suspect gunman, a pedestrian under a car and to destroy a cannabis farm, and a Reliant Robin is bid a fiery farewell.

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Series favourites Tony and Michelle swapped Essex for a new life on the Costa Del Sol 13 years ago. They now run a business together supplying awnings and glass walls.

programme.title: Shoplifters: At War With The Law
programme.desc: Nush receives intel about two men who are acting suspiciously. Guards Kasey and Vaz are dispatched to keep eyes on them. As the duo leave the shop, they set off the alarm and the chase is on.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The cops deal with a major drugs bust in North Yorkshire, a wanted man linked to an alleged assault on a woman, and a gang of suspected poachers who are caught driving an untaxed van.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire, cops look out for criminals and illegal drivers moving around under the cover of darkness. After a spike in catalytic converter thefts, a stinger is used to catch some thieves.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The cops deal with a major drugs bust in North Yorkshire, a wanted man linked to an alleged assault on a woman, and a gang of suspected poachers who are caught driving an untaxed van.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team tackle some boozers in Barrow whose spirits are high, Duggie and Mark look into a car that has come a cropper and its driver has fled and the cocky occupants of a Mondeo refuse to face the bald facts about their tyres.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Operational Support Unit have their hands full when a raid reveals a crowbar-wielding suspect with a house full of drugs, a taser and an offensive mouth. The chopper is scrambled to bring down a runaway burglar.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jon puts his body on the line as he tackles a drunken yob in a domestic dispute, a moonlighting pizza delivery driver is nicked after taking fast food to the extreme and Martin turns detective to catch out a drink driver.

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: A serial fraudsters bogus burglary claims are busted; a holidaymaker is caught trying to use her travel policy to fund a makeover.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Abigail and Mali walk together on the beach, and Abigail tallies up their score on the magazine compatibility test.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Lacey runs into Tane and decides to fill him in on whats happening with Jo, since her sister hasnt made any effort to reach out to him herself.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Eleanor Beecraft fears her patient is in the middle of a drugs overdose. Dr William Laird must convince a depressed man with a marijuana addiction that life is worth living. Dr Sarah Glynne encounters her first case of depression brought on by cyber-bullying, and chaos reigns when Nurse Moloney attempts to administer inoculation jabs to a family of rowdy children.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: As winter hits, the cold weather causes a spike in admissions at Barnsley Hospital. For the casualty team, theres no let-up in the blue-light arrivals. Student nurses Greg and Molly have been fast-tracked to start their placements early.

programme.title: AandE After Dark
programme.desc: A 64-year-old is rushed to hospital after falling onto fire stoking tools; a 48-year-old man is brought in after having been beaten with a baseball bat and bitten.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A man has been crushed by a forklift truck and sustained a serious leg injury, and a 22-year-old woman is trapped in her car with a badly injured ankle after a high-speed collision.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Theres a huge and very messy back cyst for Dr Adil Sheraz. Dr Toby Nelson treats a cheeky patient, and Dr Dev Shah meets a roofer with nine lives.

programme.title: Call the Bailiffs: Time To Pay Up
programme.desc: Lewis has a challenging enforcement in the north of England, removing a former premier league footballers one-time agent from a house the footballer didnt know he owned. The eviction proves anything but straightforward.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Two YouTube stars stop paying their rent and refuse to move. Landlord Paul Bloom has problems with a violent and aggressive tenant.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Five-year-old Saira has a severe peanut allergy, and was spotted eating something off the floor at nursery.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Dr Toby treats one of the largest lipomas the clinic has seen, Dr Natalia deals with a supersized warty lesion, and Dr Emma sorts out a cyst that patient Barrys wife has enjoyed squeezing.

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: The week is rounded off by challengers `The Crabapples, a family team from St Albans, who will try to defeat the Eggheads to win the rolling prize fund.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Levi boasts to Mackenzie about his interview for ED doctor at Northern Districts - the positions as good as his.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Watson tries to break a vicious circle as her patient tries to self-medicate depression with alcohol. Dr Pearce issues an urgent warning to a patient whose liver is showing the strain of coping with 25 pints a week.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Its all change at Barnsley casualty as a new system is introduced. Sister Benita is taking on the role of team leader for the first time. Also new to the department is the Wobble Room.

programme.title: 999 Critical Condition
programme.desc: When 22-year-old Ben arrives after crashing his motorbike at speed, trauma team leader Richard fears that his patient may have suffered a spinal cord injury of life changing magnitude.

programme.title: 999: Emergency Call Out
programme.desc: The team deal with an injured man under the influence drugs, a one-year-old baby in the grip of life-threatening seizures, and a fire in a garage containing hazardous chemicals.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Dr Natalia Spierings gets herself a wedding invite after helping newly engaged Carly with a secret on her back.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Muhammad is in financial trouble because his tenant has not paid rent for over four months. Carl Tams discovers that his tenants are stealing from him, so he contacts real estate attorney Chris Sharpe.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord tries to evict two violent tenants who refuse to leave the apartment. Another landlord in Wales is in serious financial trouble because her tenant has not paid rent for seven months.

programme.desc: Includes problems at the ferry office, an all-action grudge against the boss in the workplace and an everlasting proposal.

programme.sub-title: Dial B for Britain: The Story of the Landline
programme.desc: Timeshift journeys back to the age of the landline. a distant era when phones werent pocket-sized wireless devices, but bulky objects wired into our homes and workplaces.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson uncovers the secrets of the Edwardian village of Thorpeness in Suffolk, the first purpose-built seaside village in the UK.

programme.title: Canal Walks with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: Julias final walk takes her to North Wales, where 200 years ago the great engineer Thomas Telford had to overcome seemingly impossible challenges in order to access the valuable slate industries of Snowdonia. In doing so he created a masterpiece of 19th-century engineering - an aqueduct 126ft high and spanning a 1,000ft across the vale of Llangollen.

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: In the second of this three-part series, Professor Robert Bartlett explores the impact of the Norman Conquest of Britain and Ireland. Bartlett shows how William the Conqueror imposed a new aristocracy, savagely cut down opposition and built scores of castles and cathedrals to intimidate and control. He also commissioned the Domesday Book, the greatest national survey of England that had ever been attempted.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: A vivid and harrowing depiction of war which follows a 19-year-old college dropout who signs up for service in Vietnam in September 1967, and finds himself plunged into the bloody chaos of life as a GI on the front line. The winner of four Academy Awards, including Best Director and Best Picture, this is an uncompromising and semi-autobiographical study of men at war from writer-director Oliver Stone.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: American film-maker Oliver Stone, director of Platoon and Wall Street, talks to Jeremy Isaacs about his career and politics. First broadcast in 1990.

programme.title: The Bridge at Remagen
programme.desc: World War II film chronicling the tense battle to hold the Ludendorff Bridge at Remagen, the only bridge still standing across the Rhine towards the end of the war. The German officer in charge of the region faces a dilemma - destroy the bridge and strand 50,000 of his own troops on the wrong side of the river, or leave the bridge intact and effectively give up the Fatherland to the advancing Allied forces.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea

He also commissioned the Domesday Book, the greatest national survey of England that had ever been attempted.

programme.title: Crimewatch Live
programme.desc: Do you recognise the men in a smash-and-grab in which over £200k worth of bags were stolen? Also on the programme, the NCA hone in on a gangland armourer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A large shop and maisonette in Hornsey in London, an end terrace in Coventry and two maisonettes in Folkestone in Kent are sold under the hammer. The team follow the new owners progress as they try to make some money on their investments.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Danny Sebastian and the teams seek out profitable antiques in Harrogate with experts Izzie Balmer and John Cameron. In the Victorian spa town, Danny visits a famous tea rooms and learns about a vintage teapot collection.

programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Bear Grylls - Wild Reckoning

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: With two interlinked rooms to tackle, Amanda steers the ship in the bedroom whilst Alan takes charge in the adjoining lounge, but creative tensions arise when Amanda wants to get rid of Alans favourite curved arch which links the spaces together.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Theres no place quite like Argyll and Bute, or so says Denise Nurses buyer, who wants to return there from Kent. Taking a break from the house hunting, Denise hops on a ferry to the Isle of Bute to meet an artist.

programme.desc: Dom teams up with carpenter Jen to save a beloved spider slide for a community centre in Dunblane. Can they make it safe for the next generation to enjoy?

programme.desc: Roman Kemp, with sidekick Sarah Greene, hosts the quiz show where knowledge equals speed. Naomi, Matthew, John, Charlotte and Rohan race in moving podiums across the studio to try to win £5,000.

programme.desc: A twist on the classic quiz show formula, contestants search through the depths of their knowledge in an attempt to score as few points as possible.

programme.desc: Its week 7, and the remaining candidates enter the world of gamified fitness. Their mission is to create a virtual reality demo of their game, design a brand that packs a punch and score big on investments. Both teams work up a sweat, and theres gamesmanship galore, but in the boardroom, theres no escaping the big boss.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve dives in the beautiful waters of the Philippines to check out a shark that spends most of the day 550 metres below the surface. He swims with one of the deadliest snakes on the planet and searches the jungle for a tarsier, a lethal predator who eats his victims head first.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve goes nose-to-nose with a living dinosaur, meets an arachnid with legs four times longer than its body and has a night-time jungle encounter with a predator who has more armour than Iron Man.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets chased by the British Army in some of their latest and most deadly toys. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond and James May compare the new Porsche Panamera against a small envelope, a 39p stamp and the logistical might of the Royal Mail in a race from one end of the British Isles to the other. Plus, Olympic gold medal-winning sprinter Usain Bolt is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Forbidden America
programme.desc: Louis Theroux immerses himself in Floridas multimillion-dollar rap scene, as notable for the controversy surrounding its emerging stars as its creativity. Louis spends time with a number of artists achieving success through self-promotion on social media, from those playing out fierce rivalries online to those live streaming their often violent and chaotic lifestyles.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: A Zenist martial-arts expert is hired by a small-town bar to clean up the clientele and eject the trouble makers who plague the establishment. The bouncer soon encounters the local crime boss, and the scene is set for a showdown between the good and the bad of the town. Ry Cooder performs the soundtrack.

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy faces his comeback fight in Budapest, and the pressure is on. How will he cope after nearly two years out of the ring?

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: After the success of his comeback fight, Tommys road to redemption hits a major setback - his hand is injured again and needs eight weeks total rest before doctors will know if he can fight again. The last time he couldnt train, his life spiralled out of control, so now Tommy throws himself into a frenzy of activity: a TV appearance on The Wheel, family days out with Bambi, and a final push to finish the home he hopes Molly and Bambi will soon return to.

programme.title: This is CBBC!
programme.desc: Join the CBBC crew for all your favourite programmes. Tune into CBBC every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: The Farmer is stressed out and has had enough of the farm and its inhabitants. He storms off for a break, suitcase in hand, only to reappear almost immediately, the same but somehow different.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Has Danger Mouse finally met his match? An evil version of our hero escapes from a parallel dimension and joins forces with Baron Greenback.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: The heroes quest to save the forest from a magical mess.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: When Girl is failing science class, Mouse offers his teaching help. But Girl feels so hopeless, she resorts to cheating instead. It works and Girl is hailed as a budding genius, but keeping up her ruse might just cause a scientific calamity.

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: News magazine keeping young viewers up to date with the latest stories and events happening at home and abroad.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a temple dedicated to an ancestral brioche.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, but she just wants to sneak out to a party.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: When Olive and Otto get zapped into Olives favourite comic book, Olive must use her knowledge of the comic book to escape.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: Walters pampered cat Clawdia persuades her way into the gang, and only Gnasher can tell that she has a hidden agenda to oust him from Denniss life forever.

programme.title: Danny and Mick
programme.desc: Webbthorpe Leisure Centre has some new, extremely posh toilets that will receive a grand opening by Lady Fol De Rol. Lance is tasked with guarding the new facility so that Danny and Mick dont ruin the day, but the boys are desperate to try them out!

programme.title: Hey You What If?
programme.desc: Imagine a world where its possible to move things with your mind like films. However, the laws of physics mean that this superpower wouldnt quite work as people would expect.

programme.title: Bitesize: 9-11 Year Olds
programme.desc: Learn about how light travels, shadows and how we see things shadows.

programme.title: Blow Your Mind
programme.desc: Dr Chris and Dr Xand find out about the moon and how it affects our oceans and tides.

programme.title: Out of This World
programme.desc: Dr Maggie explores living in space with start guest astronaut Jessica Meir, who spent 205 days on the International Space Station. Dr Maggie also answers your space questions and announces her top five list of how long people have spent in space.

programme.title: After Life: Rot Box Detectives
programme.desc: A team of young science detectives investigate rot and decay through a series of experiments and activities, assisted by Dr George McGavin.

programme.title: Shark Bites
programme.desc: Steve Backshall reveals the positively prehistoric sixgill shark. It has barely changed in two hundred million years. Steve knows one spot off Canadas mainland where they occasionally come to shallower depths.

programme.title: Operation Ouch! Hospital Takeover
programme.desc: The doctors reveal why your body cant survive without oxygen for more than three minutes, and they find out what its like to be 999 call handlers. Dr Xand investigates how race car technology can help hospitals, and Dr Chris hits the wards.

programme.title: Horrible Science
programme.sub-title: The Force Force, Lever Man and the Goldilocks Zone
programme.desc: Meet superheroes the Force Force and some of the 17th centurys greatest minds in Friends parody Colleagues.

programme.title: Hey You What If?
programme.desc: Explore what would happen if bugs went away. Food would disappear, and there would be dung everywhere.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: The mobile phone! The vibrating poo platform! HH journeys through the history of tech.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Mankinds most ingenious inventors are given the `Horrible Histories treatment, as we take in everything from the invention of the wheel to the crisp. Featuring the Gutenberg press, the man who invented both the dictionary and manned flight. Also the Greeks and the Chinese battle as to which of them are historys best inventors.

programme.title: Shark Bites
programme.desc: Steve Backshall meets the whale shark, both the largest shark and the largest fish in the world. Steve dives with this gargantuan shark off the coast of Mozambique in Africa and reveals their somewhat surprising diet.

programme.title: Andy And The Band
programme.desc: Odd Sock Tyler needs to replace his missing dance crew. Andy and the band put their best feet forward but its a bit more choreography chaos than dancing distinction!

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.desc: Nitro and Sabre prank Steel at a fake Halloween photoshoot with a huge spider costume, bats and a surprising ghost! The other Gladiators have fun behind the scenes at Sheefield Arena.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: After an encounter with a school of migrating tuna, the Octonauts discover that one of the speedy fish, Tina, has been left behind. They have to help get her to the tuna spawning grounds in time.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: During a hoverboard race, Dads new super-powered hoverboard malfunctions, so Cosima and Big Lizard throw the race to rescue him!

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: The Piri gang enter a treasure hunt competition but discover they must pay Captain Krill with sprats for clues. Pancake is suspicious. Is there some fishy business going on?

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: The witch casts a spell of squeaky voices on the heroes which will be lifted once they have completed a quest to the Super Creepy Haunted Forest.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of a young bear called Tish, her bear family and her larger-than-life imaginary friend Tash, as they learn about the world around them.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Sula really enjoy painting a giant mural at Ammas nursery until Bings enthusiastic rainbow painting makes paint run all over Sulas beautiful tree. Sula is upset, until Flop and Amma help them see that the painting is not spoiled - it is just different. In fact, the harder they look the more they can see that they have painted a beautiful rainbow tree.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po drive the Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup where they discover the Tubby Uppy Downy. They have fun going up down, then down up.

programme.title: Tee and Mo
programme.desc: Tee wants his bike to go faster so Mo suggests she remove the stabilisers. Tee needs some convincing.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Chilli says hes a great skateboarder, but when Supertato needs his help to catch Evil Pea, Chilli cant skateboard at all! Carrot, Chilli and Supertato create a chilli rocket to defeat Evil Pea.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Sula, Pando and Bing discover a birds nest while making a playhouse in the shed. They try to find the bird by being super quiet, and she flies into their playhouse. When Bing goes in to look for her, she flies out again; they cant both be in the playhouse at the same time. So Bing decides to give the shed to her until her chicks have all grown up.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Everyone wants to win Swoppitons hide-and-seek tournament. But Mojo and Bo accidentally break the prize. They need to get it back together without the seeker spotting them!

programme.title: Hey Duggees Squirrel Club
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn, from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels are excited to go to a black-and-white gala at King Tigers house. On arrival, theyre impressed with King Tigers party crown and its resplendent red ruby centrepiece, even if his composure is somewhat ruined by frequent and giant sneezes. The Squirrels set about testing out Duggees golden rules for party etiquette by mingling with fellow guests but get a suspiciously lukewarm response.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice cream if they can get him into the car. The only problem is, hes just entered `Ragdoll mode.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Blueys game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand, until they realise they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault, hoping to keep some seeds from Glitchs rare fruit tree safe for the future. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble. Glitch accidentally crashes the Grimbler into the vault, and its hot engines start melting the ice that keeps the seeds cool. With the Go Jetters delayed by a malfunctioning Jet Pad, Ubercorn and Glitch try to save the scientists, the vault and Glitchs rare seeds.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: When a very sleepy Tommy Brock is hoisted up into the Squirrel Camp, Peter and friends must work out how to get the snoozing brute back down to earth before he wakes up!

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: The Octonauts expand their exploration beyond the sea - and onto land. With new rides and new friends, they are prepared to protect any habitats and animals at risk on land or under the water.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.sub-title: Fractions Are a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: At a party on Fraction Island, One joins the Fraction Friends in a song about fractions!

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. From A to Z, every Alphablock has fun discovering the magic of wordplay. The Alphablocks play hide and seek.

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: Love Monster has to deal with being the only monster in a town full of cute baby animals. Based on the `Love Monster series of books by award-winning British author and illustrator Rachel Bright.

programme.title: Playtime Towers
programme.desc: Its laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyones socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, its young Asparagus, sharing his deep affection for wet weather in the song I Love the Rain.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and his friends put on a show in the park. After Cocos dance, Pandos song and Sulas acrobatics display everyone is excited to see Bings finale. When he gets up on the stage, Bing is overcome with stage fright so his friends and rainbow fairy mice come to the rescue.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `hedgehog, and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today we meet lots of hedgehogs: a brown hedgehog, a small hedgehog, a snuffling hedgehog and a hungry hedgehog. Dee meets a prickly hedgehog.

programme.title: Lu and the Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Declan accidentally upsets Gus by not properly explaining the rules of a game.

programme.title: Piggy Builders
programme.desc: Fiona wants to go on an adventure but cant carry all her things. The Piggies turn her yurt into a flying Yurticopter so that she can take everything with her - but is it strong enough?

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: The Twirlywoos learn about on and off by watching a man trying shoes on and taking them off in a shoe shop. Later, they encounter an octopus that jumps on and off everyone it sees.

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Justin and his friends visit a fairytale castle for a musical adventure, while Fairy Godmother Tumble has a fairytale adventure of his own.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play choo-choo and follow the Tubby Custard Machine on a Tubby Custard Ride. In Tummy Tales, children follow their nursery teacher to the local playground.

programme.title: The Baby Club
programme.desc: Giovanna and Baby Bear welcome babies Idris, Tobias, Holly, Jack, Dhilan, Isobel and their grown-ups to The Baby Club. Inside everyones bags in this episode are sponges which are explored through discovery, play, song and story. Grown-ups at home are encouraged to take part by hiding baby appropriate sponges inside a fabric bag or pillowcase for them to reveal and explore with their baby! The baby song `We use a sponge to wash! features, as does a story involving Baby Bear.

programme.title: I Spy, You Spy
programme.desc: Elsee joins her friend Mylah to have a fun game of I Spy at a play centre.

programme.title: I Can Grow It
programme.desc: James, Noah and Aaron are on a mission to tidy up the city centre garden for a party. They work with Chatterpots friends - a rake, a spade and Wheely the wheelbarrow.

programme.title: Dylans Playtime Adventures
programme.desc: Dylan the astronaut wants to walk on the moon, but when a shooting star gets pulled into a black hole the expedition turns into a rescue mission.

programme.title: Small Potatoes
programme.desc: The gang sing about the importance of family and friends in this heartfelt ballad.

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger finds a tiny, lost Bokchoydactyl and guides it to fly back to its family.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad takes care of the girls evening routine when Mum heads out to a baby shower, and he has to try extra hard to keep them entertained.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is a big, friendly dog who runs The Squirrel Club, an after-school activity club where children can learn and take part in all kinds of activities, have fun adventures, and earn badges for their achievements.

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The Game Catchers are five friends who travel through space exploring fantastic planets with one big mission: to discover, play and collect all the games in the universe.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Timmy thinks Otuss Jack-in-the-box is brilliant, and he decides to make his own. However, its not as simple as it looks and after several failed attempts, Timmy gets an idea of how he can make the best Jack-in-the-box of all.

programme.title: Our Family
programme.desc: Ted and his family head to the beach, and Ted tries his hand at making a sandcastle. When it doesnt go quite to plan, Dad shows him some top tips.

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: Febos family are from America, where they celebrate Thanksgiving. As it is traditional on Thanksgiving to prepare and serve pumpkin pie as a dessert, Febo is making this for friends. He starts by making a pastry case and fitting it in a pie dish.

programme.title: Ferne and Rorys Teeny Tiny Creatures
programme.desc: Maisie finds out all about some very busy creatures - honeybees. Chantelle meets some of CBBCs Show Me the Honey team, Darcey Mae and Curtis, as they show her the inside of a hive, while Rory and his son Sandy get an unusual view of a busy hive.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Hearing dog Diesel visits Woofton library to work on Rayanes homework project, which is all about sound. But when their timer goes missing, Diesel needs his super ears to find it!

programme.title: Go Wild

programme.desc: Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet a spectacled bear and a tiger.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog

programme.title: Puffin Rock
programme.desc: Oona and Silky try to find a fun game they can play together.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: The builders next door are making so much noise that Yukee and her friends cant hear themselves play their instruments. Instead of trying to drown out all that drilling and banging, what if they played along with it instead?

programme.title: My Petsaurus
programme.desc: Chloe and Topsy are playing a game of fetch in the park - or at least theyre trying to, but Topsy doesnt seem to quite understand the rules.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Yakka Dee! celebrates children communicating - because talking fills you up with whizz, pop, bang! Dee encourages a friend to say boat and theres a whirlwind word adventure. There are lots of different boats: a boat thats big, a boat thats small, and even a boat you can stick on the wall.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: The Rainbow Sevens have gathered to make one big Rainbow Seven mural. Numberblock Sixty-Three meets each friend that makes up the Rainbow Sevens to see what they have planned for their paintings, and to get inspiration for his own painting too. Each of the Rainbow Sevens have their own rainbow styles, underneath one great big colourful rainbow.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: The Alphablocks meet their match when Brown Cow and her singing friends Owl, Howl and Growl take the stage! This episode has fun with the -ow- digraph and the words cow, brown, owl, howl, growl, gown, crown, town and down.

programme.title: Something Special: Were All Friends
programme.desc: Justin has double the fun with a pair of twins when he spends the day at their school. Meanwhile, Chef Tumble cooks Mr Tumble a pair of breakfasts!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies find different uses for their favourite things and a child in Tummy Tales makes a seaside picture out of lots of things from a make-and-do box. In Teletubbyland a large tube appears. The Teletubbies use it as a telescope and as a loud speaker.

programme.title: Patchwork Pals
programme.desc: Patchwork Starfish has a problem: he loves to dance, but he has hurt his leg. The Patchwork Pals must find a way to help him.

programme.desc: Raa Raa and his friends put on a Jungle show, but with everyone performing on stage, who will watch it?

programme.desc: Evil Pea makes a giant dough blob that almost covers the entire supermarket.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Resolutions

programme.sub-title: The One With Chandlers Work Laugh
programme.desc: Monica is annoyed when she discovers Chandler is ingratiating himself with his new boss Doug. He even has a fake laugh which he uses whenever Doug cracks a joke. Meanwhile, Rachel is obsessed with finding out the gossip between Monica and Chandler after overhearing a sexy conversation between them, and Ross astounds everyone with his new girlfriend, a blast from the past.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: At her grandmothers funeral, Phoebe is astounded to meet her biological father, Frank Sr, who she has been trying to find for years. Elsewhere, Chandler tells perfectionist Monica that she is useless at massage, and Joeys fondness for an expensive bag loses him an audition.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
programme.desc: Chandler and Monicas relationship becomes less of a secret, and Ross must prove to his boss that hes sane in order to return to work.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Girl Who Hits Joey
programme.desc: Chandler becomes anxious when he thinks Monica wants more from their relationship, and Ross moves into his new apartment and fails to impress his new neighbours. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe finds a police officers badge and goes on a spree of arrests until she meets up with the owner, while Joey wonders if he is in love with Monica.

programme.sub-title: The One With Rachels Inadvertent Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel has an interview for her dream job at Ralph Lauren. Meanwhile, Monica competes to have a better relationship than Phoebes, and Joey is arrested for stalking a sexy neighbour with whom Ross gets a date.

programme.sub-title: The One With the Ride Along

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: After Gary confides in Monica that he intends to ask Phoebe to move in with him, Monica immediately breaks her promise to him and tells Phoebe, who worries that it is too early in the relationship. programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: According to a legend that dates back to the 16th century, a cache of Incan gold worth hundreds of millions of dollars is hidden off the coast of southeastern Brazil. Its known as the `Treasure of the Trinity, and its eluded all who have sought it for 500 years. But a modern-day team of explorers follows a radical new theory to uncover its whereabouts: a remote, treacherous island where thousands of deadly vipers roam. Cork Graham leads the expedition to Queimada Grande - known to locals as Snake Island - armed with advanced technology to unearth complex clues and decipher puzzles that have protected the treasure for centuries. This Discovery series takes viewers along on the epic journey to one of the most dangerous places on Earth.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: According to a legend that dates back to the 16th century, a cache of Incan gold worth hundreds of millions of dollars is hidden off the coast of southeastern Brazil. Its known as the `Treasure of the Trinity, and its eluded all who have sought it for 500 years. But a modern-day team of explorers follows a radical new theory to uncover its whereabouts: a remote, treacherous island where thousands of deadly vipers roam. Cork Graham leads the expedition to Queimada Grande - known to locals as Snake Island - armed with advanced technology to unearth complex clues and decipher puzzles that have protected the treasure for centuries. This Discovery series takes viewers along on the epic journey to one of the most dangerous places on Earth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown

Homers thumb is sliced off when he tries to sneak a brownie from Marge and the journey to Dr Nicks in Rainer Wolfcastles Ferrari is not a simple one. Lisa misses the school bus on the day she was due to enter her grammar robot Linguo in the science fair, and Bart plays with Fat Tonys stash of smuggled fireworks.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay has grown children, grandchildren and a gorgeous young wife, who has a preteen son of her own; all together they must try to bridge generational, cultural and social gaps.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: One couple are smitten on honeymoon. Another are very much not. And two new couples get hitched, including flashy English groom Danny.

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: Two brand-new solo travellers make a big impression when they join the group in Porto. A morning of port tasting leads to some loose lips and, following a trip to circus school, things get heated at the vote as one celeb couple come under fire.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Ice Cream of Margie (With the Light Blue Hair)
programme.desc: After losing his job, Homer becomes an ice-cream man, but his dedication to his new career threatens to undermine his marriage.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes best friends with his former adversary Nelson, but when the bully catches him on an illicit rendezvous with Millhouse, Bart begins to fear for his safety.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bong Joon-hos "Parasite," Bambis revenge and much, much more are featured in the annual Halloween special.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The experiment intensifies. Gia considers taking a big step after years of celibacy, while tensions explode in Fiji for Bec and Danny.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The diners in the First Date restaurant include single mum Frankie and primary teacher Charlie, Olive and Terence who are both in their 80s, and a 34-year-old divorcee Karen with her blind date Mitch.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A celebration of the naughtiest bits of `Naked Attraction, revisiting the good, the bad and the kinky, from a polyamorous couple and a three-time picker to food fetishes and whipped cream.

programme.title: The Rhythm Section
programme.desc: Stephanie Patrick veers down a path of self-destruction after a tragic plane crash kills her family. When Stephanie discovers it wasnt an accident, she soon embarks on a bloody quest for revenge to punish those responsible.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Robert Jordan is the idealist who joins the Republicans and is charged with blowing up a strategically important bridge. Among the group aiding him are Maria, with who he falls in love, Pablo, the drunken leader of the group and his wife Pilar, who eventually takes charge.

programme.title: Beast Interview Special
programme.desc: Interview with the director and the stars of `Beast.

programme.title: All the Kings Men
programme.desc: Chronicling the rise and fall of demagogic politician Willie Stark. Stark starts out with a burning sense of purpose and a defiant honesty, but is gradually corrupted by the power he wields. Loosely based on the career of Depression-era Louisiana senator Huey Long.

programme.title: Mary, Queen of Scots
programme.desc: Elizabeth I of England and her Catholic cousin, Mary Stuart, use political intrigue to manoeuvre for the English throne. Along the way they faces perilous and dangerous foes, each wanting their own chance of securing the throne.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: Six southern belles deal with marriages, deaths, births and everything in between by staying strong as steel on the inside, and immaculate on the outside, thanks to therapeutic visits to their local beauty salon.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: A bank robber tries to turn himself in because hes falling in love and wants to live an honest life but when he realises the Feds are more corrupt than him, he must fight back to clear his name.

programme.title: The Killing Fields
programme.desc: The true story of `New York Times reporter Sidney Schanberg and his efforts to locate his Cambodian friend and translator Dith Pran after he was captured by the brutal Khmer Rouge while working for Schanberg in Cambodia in 1973. The film follows Prans efforts to survive the Khmer Rouge regime and the purge of the country that took Cambodia into `Year Zezo.

programme.desc: Living alone in the Oregon wilderness, a truffle hunter returns to Portland to find the person who stole his beloved pig.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood City Bakes
programme.desc: Paul is in Warsaw, discovering a cafe scene at Odette that would out-do even the best Paris can offer. With head chef Jarek Nowakowski, Paul creates a new take on the Polish babka, a sponge flavoured with citrus, honey and coconut.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood City Bakes
programme.desc: Paul is in Americas original seaside resort of Miami. Here he gets the chance to create his own version of the classic favourite, Florida key lime pie, using a delicious but deceptively simple recipe.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers go off the beaten track in search of authentic flavours of Italy, from simple, local ingredients to spicy nduja pate and some of the best gelato to be found.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond heads to the lodge to make a fabulous meat-free Tex-Mex frittata along with other epic meat-free meals.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummonds focus is on her father-in-law. As the family help him with the cattle, she makes him dinner with a menu of all his favourites, including Chucks enchiladas, quick roasted salsa and an apple crisp for dessert.

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shows us how to make easy and delicious meals cooked in just one pan, pot or dish, starting with frying-pan pasta, a twist on a fish pie and a sublime roast lamb feast.

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shows us how to make a super-fast, flavoursome smoky noodle soup, the cleverest home-made bread and a chicken and mushroom pie with a time-saving tip for perfect pastry.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Marshmallows and white chocolate bark; winter squash soup; displaying and wrapping candy.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Three canapes; Salmon tartare; sopresatta with cheese in puff pastry; chipotle and rosemary nuts.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: In the third series, the search for Britains best amateur baker is back as 12 passionate baking fans compete for the title. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins return as presenters, as do judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood, who devise the three challenges faced by the competitors each week. They incorporate a signature bake, which tests the bakers personality and creative flair; a technical bake, which tests experience; and a showstopper bake, during which the bakers are able to showcase their depth of skill and talent. Berry and Hollywood inspect, prod and sample the baked goodies as they decide who gets to have their cake - and eat it.

programme.desc: James and Lawrence Keogh do some serious shopping in the market at Lamballe. What are they going to make with all that lamb, sweet black pudding, pears and pear liqueur, fromage frais, leeks and gateaux Bordeaux?

programme.title: James Martins French Road Trip
programme.desc: Local boy Daniel Galmiche joins James in the well-stocked market in Dinan in Brittany. They buy bags of special salt for their sea bass bake. Daniel also checks out the beautiful local oyster beds.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Gareth Ward. They enjoy some Welsh Mountain cider tasting, then James uses some to dish up some cider- infused apple fritters with cider custard. Gareth discovers a cattle farm which rears Welsh Wagyu cattle who are fed on local beer. Later they take time out and Gareth is challenged to a thrilling rally car ride, while James demonstrates his dog training prowess with his trusty hound Cooper.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: Jamess final stop is in Englands first National Park: The Peak District. He is joined by cooking legend Tessa Bramley, who serves him up a delicious beef fillet along with vegetables from her beautiful garden. James takes part in an unusual contest, hen racing, where he challenges a local lad and world champion to a race. After discovering some award-winning gin, James meets a local forager and samples some of his elderflower wine.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Adam braves the Gigante Burrito Challenge at Sweet Ps BBQ.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Casey Webbs epic food adventure takes him to Lafayette, Louisiana. He tries Cajun stew and accepts an ultra-spicy ramen bowl challenge.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieris grabbing seaside snacks, global spice and Southern soul. In Georgia, a Tybee Island joint goes gourmet with hot dogs, while a Savannah soul food spot rolls out an oxtail twist. Then in Idaho, a Boise cafe serves up a taste of Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into amped-up eats, from Nashville hot chicken at a coastal Georgia joint and savoury Vietnamese street food in a Calgary noodle bar.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Americas most interesting and unique restaurants. Guy visits a classic restaurant in Nashville, a smoked barbecue joint in Georgia, and a seafood chowder and lobster spot in Maine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy finds great Italian food including pasta and meat sauce in Tennessee, sausage and peppers in Texas and stromboli in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Buddy turns up the heat with a fire-breathing dragon cake for a modern-day medieval knight. Plus, a cat cafe wants Mary to make a cake for a feline wedding - and to officiate it!

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Buddy meets a floral-loving bride who wants bouquets of flower cupcakes for her big day. Plus, Mauro celebrates his 25th wedding anniversary with Madeline in romantic style!

programme.desc: Ree Drummond prepares speedy seafood done four ways. She makes coconut shrimp and mango dipping sauce Greek grilled salmon with veggies, and a mixed seafood pasta.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Ina is making dinner for her friend Miguel Florres-Vianna who is out at the barn photographing the garden. While Miguel takes photos he creates a surprise table setting for Ina inspired by foliage found in the garden. On the menu are Panko crusted salmon, warm French lentils, all American cheeseboard and chicken noodle soup for Miguels journey back to the city.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Its a drill dinner for local fire fighters. After a practice fire drill, Ina pitches in and serves the fire fighters up a delicious dinner back at the station. Theres Beef Barley Soup, Firefighter Scott Elleys Sloppy Joes served with Inas Stilton Dressing and make-your-own Pecan Caramel Sundaes.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: In the third series, the search for Britains best amateur baker is back as 12 passionate baking fans compete for the title. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins return as presenters, as do judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood, who devise the three challenges faced by the competitors each week. They incorporate a signature bake, which tests the bakers personality and creative flair; a technical bake, which tests experience; and a showstopper bake, during which the bakers are able to showcase their depth of skill and talent. Berry and Hollywood inspect, prod and sample the baked goodies as they decide who gets to have their cake - and eat it.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: In the third series, the search for Britains best amateur baker is back as 12 passionate baking fans compete for the title. Berry and Hollywood inspect, prod and sample the baked goodies as they decide who gets to have their cake - and eat it.

programme.title: James Martins French Road Trip
programme.desc: James Martin and chef Daniel Galmiche visit the food markets in Reims. Later, they cook pan-fried lamb with smoked garlic and Provencal vegetables.

programme.title: James Martins French Road Trip
programme.desc: James Martin and chef Lawrence Keogh scour the food markets in Aix-en-Othe. Furthermore, they make pan-fried guinea fowl with mushrooms and baby onions.

programme.title: James Martins French Road Trip
programme.desc: James Martin and chef Daniel Galmiche hunt for delicious ingredients in Reims, and they prepare pan-fried cod with smoked sausage and choucroute.

programme.title: James Martins French Road Trip
programme.desc: James Martins food adventure continues with a trip to Aix-en-Othe, a town in the north of France. He is joined by chef Lawrence Keogh who is cooking pan-fried pork with anise squash.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: The bikers begin their Sardinian adventure in the small town of Cagliari, where everyone is in high spirits for the feast of St Efisio. The locals are dressed in traditional garb to parade through the town on decorated bullock carts. The bikers join in the fun by cooking a local speciality, almond and orange cakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks for her always-hungry teenage sons. She makes buffalo chicken totchos, a fun twist on pizza with her broccoli cheese Stromboli and a one-pot beef noodle skillet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond prepares speedy seafood done four ways. She makes coconut shrimp and mango dipping sauce Greek grilled salmon with veggies, and a mixed seafood pasta.

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shows us how to make a foolproof traybaked salmon, super-easy tomato fritters, and roasted rolled pork with a risotto that are both cooked in the same casserole pan.

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver takes midweek meals up a notch, as he knocks out flavour-packed gnocchi and giant spicy meatballs, and turns a family favourite on its head with his upside-down fish pie.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Ina is making dinner for her friend Miguel Florres-Vianna who is out at the barn photographing the garden. While Miguel takes photos he creates a surprise table setting for Ina inspired by foliage found in the garden. On the menu are Panko crusted salmon, warm French lentils, all American cheeseboard and chicken noodle soup for Miguels journey back to the city.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Casey Webb journeys across America to tackle daunting food challenges and sample iconic regional dishes. Enormous food options create problems for even the most voracious of eaters.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Casey Webb journeys across America to tackle daunting food challenges and sample iconic regional dishes. Enormous food options create problems for even the most voracious of eaters.

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Laila Ali invites married couples to her arena, starting with Michael and Kwini, who challenge their friends and rivals, Lucy and Bret. Then, Chef Tia Raiford challenges husband Chef Matthew Raiford to see who gets top billing in their home kitchen.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Mississippi Adventure
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers roar back into life with a madcap tour of the Mississippi. They visit Memphis for the tastes and sounds of soul, meeting the queen of soul food.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Mississippi Adventure
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers continue their Mississippi adventures. In New Orleans, they meet a living blues legend and get to grips with some of the best local food.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Mississippi Adventure
programme.desc: The biker boys walk in the footsteps of music legends and experience some amazing Southern food. They fulfil a lifelong dream when they visit Graceland.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Buddy flaunts his cake - and dance - moves when he designs a flamenco cake. Meanwhile, Mauro and the team make a cake for a nearby summer camp, and it gets messy!

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: The team go back to school with a cake to mark an event for the Mayor of Newark providing school supplies for kids, and Madeline is tasked with a rainbow cake for a charity run!
