programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of the South Wests finest chefs, returning contender Emily Watkins, experienced Dominic Chapman and newcomer Josh Eggleton fight it out. Today they must cook their starter courses to be judged by the surprise veteran judge.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The South West chefs, returner Emily Watkins and Michelin starred Dominic Chapman and Josh Eggleton do battle for the fish course. Dom has been inspired by his research trip to the scene of the D Day landings.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The South West chefs Emily Watkins, Dominic Chapman and Josh Eggleton cook their main courses for the veteran judge. With the competition so tight can one of them pull out in front before the deciding dessert course?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the dessert course and the South West chefs last chance to secure a place in the regional final. Two will make it through to cook their menus for the judges but either Emily Watkins, Dominic Chapman or Josh Eggleton must leave the competition.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two South West chefs left standing cook their four courses again for the judges. Theyre joined by special guest judge and hero of the D-Day landings, 93-year-old war veteran Ken Sturdy, a Royal Navy signalman in World War II.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of Wales top chefs, returning contender Mary Ann Gilchrist, former military man David Kelman and fellow newcomer Andy Beaumont compete for the last remaining place in the finals.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Welsh chefs, newcomer Andy Beaumont, military man David Kelman and returning contender Mary Ann Gilchrist go head to head for the fish course. Ambitious Andy and determined David are hoping to steel a lead over Mary Ann.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Welsh chefs Andy Beaumont, David Kelman and Mary Ann Gilchrist are all hoping to score highly with their very individual main courses. Mary Anns taking a risk with another austerity themed dish.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the dessert course and the Welsh chefs last chance to impress. After David Kelmans main course result, Mary Ann Gilchrist and Andy Beaumont must do everything they can not to crack under the pressure.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining Welsh chefs fight it out for the last place in the finals. They must both cook all four courses of their D Day inspired menus again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort who are joined by guest judge Martin Bell.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of Northern Irelands top chefs, returning finalist Raymond McArdle, Richard Corrigans protege Chris McGowan and young gun Will Brown go head to head. They must impress a mystery veteran judge with their starter courses.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Northern Irish chefs, returning finalist Raymond McArdle, Richard Corrigans protege Chris McGowan and young gun Will Brown fight it out for the fish course. Rays hoping to build on his strong starter score.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its main course day for the Northern Irish chefs. Rays going all out to impress the veteran judge by cooking two separate dishes but will last years Northern Irish champ let the pressure get to him?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the Northern Irish chefs last chance to impress with their dessert courses. Young gun Will Brown needs to play a blinder and hope that his rivals fall at the final hurdle as today one chef must leave the competition.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining Northern Irish chefs cook their entire menus again for judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort who are joined by special guest judge Celia Sandys.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of the North Easts finest chefs, Michelin trained Paul Welburn, Michelin starred Frances Atkins and returning champion Colin McGurran will cook their menus for the mystery veteran judge.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The North East chefs Michelin starred Frances Atkins, determined Paul Welburn and returning champion Colin McGurran go head to head with their fish courses.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The North East chefs Frances Atkins, Paul Welburn and Colin McGurran attempt to impress the veteran judge with their main courses.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the North East chefs last chance to impress with their desserts as only two will get to cook for the judges. Frances Atkins serves another dish inspired by her fathers involvement in D Day.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining chefs for the North East fight it out for one place in the finals, cooking all four of their courses again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Mary Ellen McTague, James Durrant and Mark Ellis must do everything they can to impress the surprise veteran judge wholl be scoring their dishes with their starter courses and theyre each drawing on personal inspiration.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Mary Ellen McTague, Jason Athertons protege James Durrant and fellow newcomer Mark Ellis go head to head for the fish course.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its main course day, and after the disastrous fish course Mary Ellen McTague, James Durrant and Mark Ellis are all desperate to impress the veteran judge.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its Mary Ellen McTague, James Durrant and Mark Ellis last chance to impress with their desserts as at the end of todays cooking one chef must leave the competition.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining North West chefs cook their four courses again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort, who must decide which chef will win a place in the finals.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of London and the South Easts superstar chefs, returning contender Adam Simmonds, Michelin-starred newcomer Tom Sellers and his former boss Adam Byatt, attempt to dazzle the mystery judge with their starter courses.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: London and South East chefs, Adam Simmonds, Tom Sellers and Adam Byatt continue their battle. Does a trip to Adam Byatts nans house to find out about his grandfathers military connections spur him on to fish course glory?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The London and South East chefs Adam Simmonds, Tom Sellers and Adam Byatt go head to head cooking their main courses. At the crucial half way stage the chefs must do all they can to score highly.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its dessert course time as the London and South East chefs compete for one of two places in the judges chamber and the competition couldnt be tighter.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its a tightly fought battle today as the two remaining London and South East chefs cook all four of their dishes again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Theyre joined by special guest judge, Joy Hunter.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three of the Central regions top chefs, returning champion Aktar Islam, Daniel Cliffords protege Mark Poynton and ambitious newcomer Jason Hodnett go into battle. They begin with their starter courses.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Returning champion Aktar Islam, Daniel Cliffords protege Mark Poynton and ambitious newcomer Jason Hodnett fight it out for fish course glory. After plating up late last time will Aktar manage to be on time today?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Central region chefs Aktar Islam, Mark Poynton and Jason Hodnett go head to head cooking their main courses for the veteran judge. With Mark and Aktar fighting for the lead can Jason sneak under the radar to take them by surprise?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its dessert day and the Central chefs Aktar Islam, Mark Poyton and Jason Hodnett are all striving for one of two spots in the regional final. Will Jasons elaborate chocolate medal dessert see him triumph or sent home empty handed?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining Central region chefs cook all four courses again for the judges Prue Leith, Oliver Peyton and Matthew Fort. Theyre joined by special guest judge Max Hastings.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the starter course and as the chefs arrive they discover theres added competition following the London and South East regions shock result. The judges are joined by D-Day veteran George Batts.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the fish course and those chefs who didnt make it onto the shortlist with their starters are hoping to do better. The judges are joined by Ken Sturdy who landed on Sword Beach on D-Day and who helped judge the North West region.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the half-way point in finals week and those chefs who have yet to get a dish onto the shortlist are feeling the heat. The judges are joined by Baroness Trumpington who worked as a cypher clerk at Bletchley Park from 1941 to 1946.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the last chance for the chefs to get their dish in contention for the final banquet and those whove failed to finish in the top three so far are going all out. Joining the judges is Celia Sandys, Winston Churchills granddaughter.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the moment of truth as the victorious four must put their finest hours on a plate for those who served both on the front line and the home front, such as D-Day veterans Ken Sturdy and George Batts.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson visits the Cairngorms National Park to discover how Queen Victoria and Prince Albert helped to shape Scottish traditions and imagery such as tartan, bagpipes and caber tossing.

programme.title: Digging for Britain

On the Scottish island of Iona, there are traces of a long-lost monastery and pilgrimage site that was originally built by the legendary Saint Columba, and has been compared to Jerusalem. In the east of Scotland, a weapons hoard belonging to a wealthy Bronze Age warrior is unearthed.

programme.title: Digging for Britain

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion is in Plaistow in London looking around a three-bedroom semi, Lucy is checking out a small piece of land in Crayford in Kent, and Martin meets a father and son who have bought a small house with a big garden in Wheelock in Cheshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A former miners cottage in Aberaman in South Wales and semis in Adderley Green in Stoke and Streatham in South London are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin, Lucy and Dion travel the country meeting developers hoping to make some money from their auction buys. Today they are in Stoke, Croydon and Warrington hearing tales from the auction rooms.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A former doctors surgery in need of TLC is converted into a family home in Houghton-le-spring and a flat in a 1930s block of flats in Edgware and a detached house in a woodland garden in Ashford in Kent are also given makeovers.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Theres a family home in Consett in County Durham, a rental investment in Derby and an auction buy in Beckenham in London which will be used to run a new business.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion looks round a large Victorian terrace in Plumstead, Martin is in Mickleover in Derby hearing a father and daughters plans for a flat and Lucy discovers what happened to a plot of land she saw five and a half years ago.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin looks round a bungalow in a stunning setting in the Lake District while Dion has a look at a flat close to Nottingham city centre. Lucy meets a woman who mistakenly thought she was buying a piece of land in Folkestone in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat with huge potential in Londons Earlsfield, and terraced houses in Wombourne near Wolverhampton and Ynyswen near Treorchy in Wales are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A first-floor one-bedroom flat in Londons Stepney Green, a three-bed semi in Dartford in Kent and a one-bedroom flat on the 17th floor of a block in Salford are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s bungalow in Dereham in Norfolk, a first-floor flat in Londons East Ham and a property in Maryport in Cumbria with a hidden room are all sold at auction. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear their plans for their investments.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin, Lucy and Dion visit a fifth-floor flat in Greater Manchester, a three bed semi in Carlisle and three commercial buildings near Stanstead.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: An old Derbyshire farmhouse in Wirksworth gets a stunning make over, a developer builds a pair of semis in Chatham in Kent while a mid-terraced house in Blackhall Colliery in County Durham is given a makeover ready for the rental market.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin visits a stone cottage in Tilton on the Hill in rural Leicestershire while Martin Roberts is at a property auction buy in Croydon on the outskirts of London and Lucy Alexander meets two friends who have bought a bungalow in Rainham in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mid-terrace house in Chaddesdon in Derby, a two-bedroom flat in Londons Maida Vale and a property in Warrington are all sold under the hammer. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the new owners to hear what they have planned for their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin looks round a pretty cottage with outbuildings with huge potential in Burton upon Trent, while Lucy checks out a flat in Londons Crystal Palace and Dion is in Mossley near Manchester in a four-bedroom bungalow.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin tackles the issue of solar panels on a property in Mountain Ash in Wales and wonders if itll be a sunny outcome for the new owner, while Lucy looks round a barn in Elstree in Hertfordshire and Dion visits a flat in Newport in Shropshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts meets a couple who buy a former millworkers cottage in Derbyshire as their first home together; Lucy Alexander meets a father and daughter team who are seasoned developers buying a house in Kent; and Dion Dublin talks to a man who, along with two friends, has clubbed together to buy an investment property in Lowestoft in Suffolk.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.desc: Seven years into their marriage, something suddenly changes between a husband and wife. A dirty secret at work will come out into the open and lead to a deadly confrontation between the two.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old college sophomore Martin Roberts is a popular fraternity brother, then he goes missing, leaving behind a cryptic note. Two years later, Roberts family remains desperate to know what happened to him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: A police officer in Manhattan Beach, Calif., is shot and killed during a routine traffic stop in 1993, and the only witness is a boy who is too terrified to tell police what he saw.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Investigators must overturn a shocking decision before they can solve the hauntingly familiar murder of a teenager.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A female active-duty soldier dies in a brutal attack during a night out with members of her unit. Police try to determine if a secret fear she mentioned to her mother is the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: Bestselling author, Helen Bailey, was a wealthy widow. After finding love again with Ian Stewart she vanished. He helps in the search - but was it a cover-up?

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: Looking at the phenomenon of high-profile criminal cases where people publically claim they are innocent about a crime they have committed.

programme.title: A Killer Among Friends
programme.desc: A gunman kills a University of Kentucky football player at his birthday party. Despite a house full of witnesses, no one saw the shooter. As police investigate, suspicion closes in on his closest friends who were there that night.

programme.title: Portals to Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Katrina visit a mansion in Denver. Plagued by bad luck and a string of untimely deaths, some believe that it has a portal to the netherworld.

programme.title: Haunted Towns

programme.desc: Shanna and Jon save for years to buy a new house in Arizona, but a darkness within jeopardises their relationship, their sanity and their safety; with her marriage on the verge of collapse, Shanna calls out to Cindy and Steve for answers.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated

programme.desc: As the sleepless nights continue for Billie and Greg, the pair are at breaking point - after moving Margot into her own room, Billie decides that more urgent measures are needed as she calls in the help of a Sleep Nanny.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex
programme.desc: The Bali gang are back in Essex and everyone is reunited. Dan and Ella are delighted to be together again and head off for a romantic getaway. Elsewhere, Joe and Junaid are over the moon to be boyfriend and boyfriend and share their happy news with Joes parents. Saff bids an emotional farewell to Jason as she finally moves out, and Elma returns and catches up with Courtney, sharing all the latest about her relationship with Sammy.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Miami
programme.desc: The ladies scramble to get Guerdy off the gondola and into an ambulance; Adriana performs at Mexico City Pride; Kiki reaches her breaking point with Lisa.

programme.title: Ant and Decs Limitless Win
programme.desc: Stepfather and son-in-law Steve and Jordan are back to finish their game - theyre already up into the tens of thousands of pounds, but Jordan and his wife Megan still live at home and Steve is hoping to win enough money to finally get Jordan and his wife out of the house and set them up with a home of their own. Husband-and-wife team Richard and Lorna then face the Limitless Ladder looking to win some major money.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton invites celebrities Tom Allen, Michelle Visage and Eddie Kadi to spin the Wheel.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emmerdale is one of Britains best-loved and highly-viewed long-running drama soaps - set in the heart of the beautiful countryside of the Yorkshire Dales, this realistic and down-to-earth drama superbly chronicles the joys and the heartbreaks of a tightly-knit countryside community.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the worlds longest running primetime drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: Hamburger Hill
programme.desc: An emotional and harrowing re-creation of the battle to secure Hill 937 in the Ashau Valley during the Vietnam War. The film follows a platoon through eleven agonising assaults over a ten-day period, suffering rivers of mud, stifling heat and driving rain as they battle against a well-entrenched enemy. This searing account of one battle can be seen as a microcosm of the Vietnam War itself.

programme.desc: Staff nurse Sophie has moved from the Lancashire coast to work at Kings College Hospital in south London, leaving her family behind for the first time. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Three-month-old Jaziah has been rushed to resus with breathing difficulties. Hes severely underweight and has an enlarged liver. Ronald, whos 81, has been brought to Kings by his daughter Tracey. Hes had a suspected stroke, which is affecting his speech.

programme.title: Yukon Vet

programme.desc: A truck loaded with fresh fish blocks a main traffic artery in northern Norway, so Jo Roger and his employee have no time to lose to get the truck free. Not only is there a risk of huge traffic jams forming, but 300,000 euros are at stake should the cargo not reach its recipient.

programme.title: Africas Hunters
programme.desc: The story of a young male hyena called Mizumu embarking on the most challenging journey of his life: to find a new clan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol

programme.title: Yukon Vet

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Yukon Vet
programme.sub-title: Dr. O and the Three Bears
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley helps a dog that was attacked while protecting its owner and a guinea pig with raspy breathing. She also takes a look at a lynx with deformed legs.

programme.title: Fish Tank Kings
programme.desc: Creating tanks for the home plate backstop of the new Miami Marlins baseball stadium requires tough materials that can survive fast balls.

programme.title: America the Wild
programme.desc: Casey Anderson looks for clues which might reveal what is behind a rash of bold wolf behaviour on Vancouver Island.

programme.title: Wild, Smart and Deadly
programme.desc: Animals wage a covert war for survival, deploying their hidden weapons with deadly precision. These adaptations, forged by centuries of evolution, give animals the edge they need to outwit predators, rivals, and the elements. From the bombardier beetles boiling spray to the mantis shrimps explosive club and the draco lizards hidden wings, meet natures awesome secret weapons.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and the clinic staff are all one big family of animal lovers, so when one of their beloved pets is sick, its right back to the office.

programme.title: Yukon Vet

programme.title: Reptile Planet

programme.title: The Hidden Kingdoms of China
programme.desc: Meet Chinas most affectionate and vocal monkeys in the remote, seasonal forests of Central China. These mountain forests and all who live here, experience unpredictable and harsh weather in a land that can be covered in snow for 4 months of the year. Follow the journey of a baby Golden snub-nosed monkey during the first year of her life as she learns all about her forest home and battles the elements to survive.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: Thords busy rescuing two crashed trucks, so when he gets a call about a group of teenagers whove skidded off the road, he sends his daughter Malin.

programme.title: Yukon Vet

programme.title: Africas Deadly Kingdoms
programme.desc: Revealing the astounding adaptations of a multitude of marine creatures to life below the waves.

programme.title: Africas Deadly Kingdoms
programme.desc: Africas grasslands stretch out on an immense scale and are home to some of the greatest wildlife.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation
programme.desc: The Roach family travels 100 miles to harvest Mother Natures bounty. The Browns recycle an old woodpile into a grazing pen for their animals.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig are taking Peppa and George to a festival - a jigsaw festival! Peppa is amazed by all of the completed jigsaws around the festival.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are watching Detective Potatoes on TV. When Piggy Dad loses his car in the parking lot, Detective Potatoes shows up and helps them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family take a trip to the market to buy some apples, cheese and fish. However, they get more than they were expecting when they stop by Mr Foxs stall - he is selling some extra special items!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: At playgroup, Madame Gazelle teaches Peppa and friends how to exercise with hoops, or hulahoop. Peppa takes her hoop home and teaches Mummy and Daddy how to use it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa Pig and Suzy Sheep are spending the day with Doctor Hamster, and they are learning about what vets do. Doctor Hamster says shes glad to have two helpers with her and calls the next patient.

programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: While Mummy and Daddy Pig attend a refresher antenatal class, Peppa and George join Miss Rabbits Sibling School where they learn about what to expect when their new sibling arrives.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George play at Granny and Grandpa Pigs house. Grandma, Peppa and George go to the shed to see what Grandpa is doing and discover that hes built a robot.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The adventures of Peppa Pig and friends continue with more fun and games.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends make up stories about their families. Even Penny gets a picture too.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: While visiting Suzy and Emilys house, Peppa is surprised that there are extra rules which she does not have in her own house. On the drive home, Peppa explains to Mummy Pig that different houses have different rules.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is confirming she is having a new baby. Mummy and Daddy Pig share the exciting news with Peppa and her brother, George.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Everyone becomes hippies for the day and Grampy Rabbit is the leader.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is so excited to meet her new baby brother or sister, but they are taking forever to arrive until suddenly Mummy Pig announces the baby is coming, now!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Baby Alexander is too young to talk, until Peppa teaches him his first word.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit gives Mummy Pig, Peppa and George a ride in her rescue helicopter. Daddy Pig is very sad to escape all the fun - but Miss Rabbit makes sure that doesnt happen.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig winds up the old cuckoo clock in Peppa and Georges bedroom. When the clock strikes the hour, a wooden bird pops out, flapping its wings and singing "Cuckoo!".

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig organises a chocolate egg hunt for Peppa and her friends. Will the piglets track down the treats?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Zoe Zebra delivers a very special letter for Peppa and George: an invitation to her birthday party.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her playgroup friends go with Madame Gazelle to visit Pedro Pony, who is poorly in hospital.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig gives her old computer to Granny and Grandpa Pig. They use it for lots of important work - as well as Happy Mrs Chicken, but who will fix it when it breaks?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends and family are looking forward to a trip to the seaside where they can make sandcastles, but when they arrive at the beach there is too much snow.

programme.desc: Mummy Pig is making pancakes, and Daddy Pig flips his so high that it sticks to the ceiling.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa tries to learn how to whistle after she realises that seemingly everyone but her can do it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are playing hide and seek, but it is Freddy Fox with his super smelling nose who is the best at playing that game.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are trying to get to the playground, but Mr Bulls roadworks are in the way.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its Georges birthday and mummy and daddy Pig have a special day planned.

programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to count by playing games at Madame Gazelles playschool.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are at the school fete where the top prize in the raffle is a trip in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Northern Ireland
programme.desc: By the late 1980s, the news in Northern Ireland is a daily list of the dead. But 14 bloody days in March 1988 mark a new level of harrowing savagery. When a car reverses at speed into an IRA funeral cortege, mourners are convinced its another attack, a repeat of a grenade and gun strike by a lone loyalist that had killed three at an IRA funeral just days earlier. The car contains two British soldiers who are lynched and shot dead by a baying mob.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

And with the competition being so close at this point, the pressure is on to find that auction-winning item. Raj makes some big finds in one of the tiniest shops of the trip and pins his hopes on a risky item that may or may not be highly collectable.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Clock connoisseur Steve Fletcher receives a thrilling assignment when Andy Cronk brings in an 18th-century French clock created by renowned maker Julian Beliard. This prized piece belonged to Andys grandfather, who obtained it by chance after the Second World War, but the minute hand is missing, the dial is chipped and the clockwork mechanisms have been cobbled together.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Woodwork expert Will Kirk is enchanted by a musical jewellery box that miraculously survived a devastating house fire. Pamela Lamb from Devon cherishes this memento, as it belonged to her elder sister Vera, who sadly passed away as a teenager. Pamela still remembers happy times when they would play with the box, but the fire scarred the pretty painted box.

A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8
programme.desc: The globetrotting crew faces an unexpected challenge when a mysterious woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. Now, they must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop her from unleashing chaos on a grand scale.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: On a remote island, a wealthy entrepreneur creates a theme park featuring living dinosaurs drawn from prehistoric DNA. Before opening the attraction to the public, he invites a top palaeontologist, palaeobotanist, mathematician/theorist, and his two eager grandchildren to experience the park. Their park visit is anything but tranquil as the parks security system breaks down, and the prehistoric creatures break out.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her bosss office, she has an `accident, falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batmans efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: Dominic Toretto is forced to come out of hiding when a loved one is brutally murdered. Heading to LA to track down the culprit, he crosses paths with Brian OConnor, the FBI agent whose undercover infiltration of Torettos gang led to the motorised miscreants exile across the border. The two men temporarily put their differences aside as they investigate the killing.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America
programme.desc: A Chinese amnesiac and his companions confront cowboys and Indians in the American West.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America
programme.desc: A Chinese amnesiac and his companions confront cowboys and Indians in the American West.

programme.title: Happy Feet Two
programme.desc: Mumbles son Erik hasnt yet found his talents, and he goes with his friends to Adelie-land which is ruled by a penguin who can fly. When Erik returns to Emperor-land and finds them trapped under big walls of ice. Will Erik be able to save his family and friends before it is too late?

programme.title: LEGO DC Super Heroes: The Flash
programme.desc: Reverse-Flash manipulates the Speed Force to put The Flash into a time loop, which forces him to re-live the same day over and over again. The Flash must find a way to restore time and finally apprehend his worst enemy before all is lost.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Fox and Hare Save the Forest
programme.desc: One day, Fox and Hare discover that Owl has disappeared. They go looking for him in the forest with all their friends and discover a big lake that wasnt there before. It is the beginning of an exciting and funny adventure.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! The Sword and the Scoob
programme.desc: An evil sorceress transports the gang back to the age chivalrous knights, spell-casting wizards, and fire-breathing dragons.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: An ordinary chameleon, Rango, winds up in the town of Dirt, a lawless outpost in the Wild West in need of a new sheriff.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A wildly imaginative seven-year-old boy discovers that his new brother, Boss Baby, is actually a spy on a secret mission, and only he can help thwart a dastardly plot that involves an epic battle between puppies and babies.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: This is the story of a ten-year-old boy named Lucas Nickle, who has just moved to a new neighbourhood, has no friends, and is the target for the local bully and his gang. His parents are leaving for a honeymoon in Puerto Vallarta, so they are too busy to attend to his problems. His sister is distracted by her cellular phone, and the grandmother is obsessed with UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog and Superman are inseparable best friends, now Krypto must convince a ragtag group of animals to master their own newfound powers to help him save Superman and the rest of the Justice League.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: When the beast-themed Animilitia plague Gotham, Batman swings out to investigate. But with The Penguin and his cyber-animals added to the mix, Batman will need the help of Green Arrow and The Flash to bring them to heel.

programme.title: Batman: Return of the Caped Crusaders
programme.desc: Batman and Robin have their hands full when Penguin, The Joker, Riddler and Catwoman join forces.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: A champion NASCAR drivers cosy position alongside his best friend at the top of the championship is threatened by a flamboyant French newcomer. With his confidence shattered, the driver draws on the help of his father and some eccentric training techniques to claw his way back to the top.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Dannys problems, the lies create more trouble.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy businessman, Zsa-zsa Korda appoints his only daughter, a nun, as sole heir to his estate. As Korda embarks on a new enterprise, they soon become the target of scheming tycoons, foreign terrorists, and determined assassins.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: When ex-German international and camp commandant Van Steiner suggests a match between the POWs and the Germans, it swiftly escalates into a propaganda exercise.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview

programme.title: Quartet
programme.desc: A long-smouldering flame is rekindled when a once-popular opera star reunites with her ex-husband and fellow performers at a retirement home for musicians.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Marmee is the head of the March household in the absence of her husband, whos away fighting in the US Civil War. Her daughters range from the headstrong Jo and sweet Beth, to domesticated Meg and wilful Amy. The film follows the trials and tribulations of the girls, from early poverty and tragedy to Jos later efforts to secure both a husband and a successful writing career, and Amys relationship with an old family friend.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: Skincare
programme.desc: A famed aesthetician faces a new challenge when a rival opens a skin care boutique directly across from her store. Suspecting that someone is trying to sabotage her, she embarks on a quest to unravel the mystery of whos trying to destroy her life.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.desc: While widow Aurora fends off a stream of admirers, daughter Emma learns the hard facts of married life.

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: The story of Brian Cloughs 44 day stint as manager of Leeds United Football Club. England, in 1974. When Don Revie quits Leeds to become the England boss, the outspoken Brian Clough takes charge. Determined to impose his own style upon Revies tough tackling team, Clough soon alienates his players and the board. Based on the book by David Pearce.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Unknown to humans, all-out war between cats and dogs has raged since the beginning of time. Now the cats face defeat if scientist Professor Brody can perfect a formula that will make all humans non-allergic to dogs. The cats leader, Mr Tinkles, plans to steal the serum, but first he must get past fearless dog agent Lou who, thanks to a mistake in recruitment, guards the Brody family.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo
programme.desc: Two years on from going their separate ways after solving their last case, the Mystery Inc crew reunite to investigate the strange goings-on at an amusement park called Spooky Island. The attraction appears to lure its young visitors in very strange ways and it is up to Scooby, Shaggy and the gang to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Borrowers
programme.desc: Based on the Mary Norton novels about a four-inch-tall family who live beneath the floorboards of a human house. The familys future is threatened when the house falls into the hands of an evil lawyer who plans to destroy it.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes on a quest to discover a stolen recipe that takes him to our world, where he tangles with a pirate.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, theyll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccups friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, young orphan Lyra Belacqua resides in Oxford under the patronage of her dashing adventurer Uncle, Lord Asriel. When Lyra comes into possession of an alethiometer, a compass that truthfully answers any question, there are people who will do anything to get hold of it, and Lyra finds herself on an epic quest to the frozen North to safeguard the future of her entire world.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes on a quest to discover a stolen recipe that takes him to our world, where he tangles with a pirate.

programme.title: The Witches
programme.desc: Creepy fairy tale following the fortunes of a young orphan who becomes embroiled in a supernatural adventure. Brought up on his kindly grandmothers scary stories about witches, he stumbles on a real coven while on holiday. Overhearing their plans to capture all the children in Britain, he sets out to stop them, remaining undeterred throughout - even when he has been turned into a mouse.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heartwarming tale in which a ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy
programme.desc: A precocious child who hopes to be a writer lands in hot water with her classmates after her secret notebook is stolen.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: Soviet and American forces give chase when the captain of a Soviet nuclear submarine sets a course for the Maine coast.

programme.title: Three Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A bookish library clerk working for a CIA front is hunted after he stumbles across a covert intelligence operation. Returning from lunch, he finds the entire office massacred. Using his codename Condor, he contacts the CIA, but when an agent tries to kill him, he kidnaps a stranger off the street to ensure his survival and attempts to turn the tables on those who want him dead.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A placid small town is brought to its knees by an infestation of destructive small creatures with a vicious sense of humour.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Six years after defeating the Gremlins, Billy and Kate have grown up and moved to New York. However, Billy stumbles across Gizmo in a genetics lab and when he gets wet, all hell breaks loose, and the stage is set for more deliciously bad taste humour.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: A thirtysomething slacker attempts to inject some stability into his life by adopting an impressionable five-year-old.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other peoples weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, hes about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Believing it essential before they go to college, four teenage boys vow to lose their virginity and enter into a pact, each attempting to be the first to do the deed as their efforts are met with varying levels of success and failure.

programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. He takes her in, and, following his schools entrepreneurial teachings, lets her turn the house into a brothel.

programme.desc: A former commando who had faked his own death comes out of retirement to rescue a young girl from violent Russian mobsters.

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: Ace assassin Arthur Bishop becomes a target when he agrees to teach reckless Steve the art of contract killing.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Former CIA assassin Jason Bourne continues his quest to fill in memory gaps. When a `Guardian reporter stumbles onto his trail, Bourne spies his chance to blow the Blackbriar black-ops brigade wide open. With some very powerful people intent on keeping their skeletons buried, he is in more danger than ever before, as his former paymasters send a series of elite killers after their reformed ex-colleague.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: A deep space transporter crash-lands on a desolate planet circled by three suns. Among the survivors are pilot Carolyn Fry, mystic Abu `Imam al-Walid, cop William J Johns and convicted criminal Richard B Riddick, and their first thoughts are of survival and escape. Then Fry finds out that the planet suffers a total eclipse every 22 years, which is when the hibernating, flesh-eating inhabitants awake and hunt.

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective is contracted to recover a stolen nuclear warhead. Hired by both the CIA and Russian intelligence, the kung-fu cop is harassed, assaulted and framed for murder as he delves into the murky world of international arms dealing.

programme.title: Enter the Dragon
programme.desc: A kung fu expert is assigned to penetrate an island fortress to destroy an opium and white slavery empire.

programme.title: Constantine
programme.desc: Supernatural tale based on the cult comic book `Hellblazer. Chain-smoking loner Constantine tries to buy his place in heaven by banishing earth-bound demons back to hell, but his fate is tied up with Angela, a policewoman investigating the alleged suicide of her twin.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity, and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater threat. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to recruit a team to stand against this newly-awakened enemy. Despite the formation of an unprecedented league of heroes in Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash, it may be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: Blade

programme.desc: When Madame Au Lait is called away to give Chikidee her ping pong lesson, Tommy and Tallulah bake a massive sticky carroty cake on their own. The race is on to free him before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are having fun helping their friends, but dont stop first to ask what their friends need. So Lopsiloo finds herself on the wrong side of the bridge, the wrong goods are served in Battersbys shop and Puffertys favourite ball is thrown out when they tidy his kennel. It is only when they take McCogginss scooter away for cleaning that they finally realise the error of their ways.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Madame Au Lait is cleaning the clockhouse so Tommy and Tallulah take their jammy sandwiches to their room to eat. When some jam gets splodged on a blanket, they dont want to upset Madame Au Lait so they clean it themselves, but when they hang it out to dry on Pufferty, it floats off and lands in a muddy puddle! Whatever will Madame Au Lait say.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Chikidee is making slow but steady progress learning to fly, so Tommy and Tallulah try to help by making her a gigantic paper aeroplane. They dont realise, until its too late, that Chikidee cant control it and has no idea how to land! Chime Time is imminent but they cant leave their friend adrift in the sky. How can they talk her down safely?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah offer to do the polishing so that Madame Au Lait can make their favourite fruity trifle. While she is out buying the ingredients, the twins go polish crazy, thinking that the more they use the happier Madame Au Lait will be and the more trifle she will make. The clockhouse is gleaming when Madame Au Lait returns, but when she sets a hoof on the floor she finds that it as slippery as an ice rink.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are asked to collect McCogginss bell for a town performance. Despite Battersbys warning that the clapper is fragile and doesnt have a spare, Tommy and Tallulah manage to break it. Deciding that they must make a replacement, they look everywhere for something to use and try some very unusual options. Will the bell be ready for Chime Time?

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: The team face the terrifying giganotosaurus - a predator bigger and more vicious than a T-Rex. Luckily, the team have unexpected assistance.

programme.title: Band of Brothers

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa

programme.desc: The ARC team are called after a nuclear submarine encounters an anomaly and a Liopleurodon in the sea. While Abby examines a raptor-like creature which the sub crew have brought on board, Connor looks for a way to lock the anomaly. programme.desc: Following a displaced raptor through an anomaly, Matt ends up in Victorian London. programme.desc: Prabhat lost his voice saving his stepmother from a truck accident. Not long after, his father is sent to jail for taking bribes. programme.desc: On a dark and foggy night a mans car runs off the road. Needing a phone, the man discovers a deserted house in the fog, where he finds a dead man and the beautiful woman who killed him. He is drawn to her, and instead of turning her in, he helps her evade the police, creating a story together. The story is truer than they realise, and someone is arrested for the murder.

programme.desc: A group of British soldiers out to explore a remote Malaysian gully through almost inaccessible terrain, have to scale the highest mountain in South East Asia just to get there. Half of the party begin to struggle on the first day, and with rations being used up quicker than planned, a tough decision has to be made. Should the lead team carry on scouting ahead or should they wait for the stragglers and risk failing the mission?

programme.title: Remember Pearl Harbor

programme.title: Weapons of World War II
programme.desc: The tank which first reared its head in World War I, fine-tuned by the Nazis as an integral part of their blitzkrieg tactics. As their Panzers conquered most of Europe, the Soviets were developing their own T34, more suited to their own harsher terrain, a turning point in the war.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Without doubt, a huge influence over modern British cuisine are the flavours of the Mediterranean. Brought at first by the Romans and more recently by hordes of holidaymakers returning from the sun, the range of dishes and ingredients we have adopted from the Med are now commonplace on our menus and in our homes. Dave Myers and Si King look at how this has evolved and create their favourite dishes.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A new recruit fresh out of training school makes her mark when she uncovers 12kg of cocaine hidden in a car that she has stopped on one of the bridges.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Customs and border protection officers think they spot a trend when they seize drugs from behind the dashboards of two cars.

programme.title: Railroad Australia

programme.title: Rick Steins Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: Rick Stein takes the viewer on an epic culinary journey by sea, down rivers and overland to explore the Far Easts diverse food cultures. He begins his odyssey in Cambodia, where he discovers the joys of freshly caught swimmer crabs cooked with green peppercorns from Kampot, once the king of pepper. He learns how to cook the famous Fish Amok, made with lemongrass and coconut and he samples Lok Lak.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers discover that the fuel tanks on a truck are full of liquid methamphetamines. Three men wearing identical clothing cause suspicion and a man is caught smuggling rare reptiles.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy and Richard settle the thorny issue of which company has, above all others, made the greatest number of truly brilliant cars. James has a novel solution for getting caravans to campsites without clogging up the roads, and Jeremy hits the track in a remarkable replica of a legendary rally car. programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson reviews the Audi Q7 V12, the BMW X5 M and a new Range Rover Overfinch 580 S. Later, Hammond attempts to solve problems caused by slow airport workers and invents the sport of Airport Vehicle Racing and Guy Ritchie is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Without doubt, a huge influence over modern British cuisine are the flavours of the Mediterranean. Brought at first by the Romans and more recently by hordes of holidaymakers returning from the sun, the range of dishes and ingredients we have adopted from the Med are now commonplace on our menus and in our homes. Dave Myers and Si King look at how this has evolved and create their favourite dishes.

programme.title: Rick Steins Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: Rick Stein takes the viewer on an epic culinary journey by sea, down rivers and overland to explore the Far Easts diverse food cultures. He begins his odyssey in Cambodia, where he discovers the joys of freshly caught swimmer crabs cooked with green peppercorns from Kampot, once the king of pepper. He learns how to cook the famous Fish Amok, made with lemongrass and coconut and he samples Lok Lak.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Sitting on the east coast of Jersey, and about 14 miles from the coast of Normandy, the small village of Gorey was, for hundreds of years the frontline of defence between the British Isles and its enemy, the French. Archaeologist Ben Robinson follows the story of this small villages history as an important military location, from the castle built in the 1200s to the experiences of the village in the second world war when occupied by Hitlers army.

programme.title: Honest Renovations

programme.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up in Louisiana
programme.desc: Katie meets Whitley, who was convicted of killing her brother after an argument. Whitley claims it was self-defence, but Katie learns she left the house and came back with a gun.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Miami Mega Jail
programme.desc: Louis spends time in the fifth and sixth floors of Miami County Jail, where many of the most volatile inmates are incarcerated; one of the most notorious sections of the prison. The inmates have developed a strange and violent jail culture and live under the sway of a gladiatorial code. Housed in large cage-like dwellings that hold up to 24 men, they remain in the cells almost all the time.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Miami Mega Jail
programme.desc: Louis Theroux goes deeper into the jail system, meeting an alleged triple murderer facing a possible death sentence. He also follows a group of forty or so younger inmates who have escaped prison by pleading guilty and agreeing to attend a four month military style boot camp.

programme.desc: Koey has a never-ending to-do list, managing a full-time job alongside a successful side hustle while raising her kids; so, when her sister generously gifts her their shared home, Koey struggles to find time for the renovations to make it her own.

programme.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up in Louisiana
programme.desc: Katie meets Whitley, who was convicted of killing her brother after an argument. Whitley claims it was self-defence, but Katie learns she left the house and came back with a gun.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Miami Mega Jail
programme.desc: Louis spends time in the fifth and sixth floors of Miami County Jail, where many of the most volatile inmates are incarcerated; one of the most notorious sections of the prison. The inmates have developed a strange and violent jail culture and live under the sway of a gladiatorial code. Housed in large cage-like dwellings that hold up to 24 men, they remain in the cells almost all the time.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Miami Mega Jail
programme.desc: Louis Theroux goes deeper into the jail system, meeting an alleged triple murderer facing a possible death sentence. He also follows a group of forty or so younger inmates who have escaped prison by pleading guilty and agreeing to attend a four month military style boot camp.

programme.title: Stacey Dooley
programme.desc: Stacey travels to America to meet people prepping for an uncertain future, all with different concerns - from climate change and natural disasters to civil unrest.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Dan and Shane suspect blood poisoning after picking up a seriously ill patient.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Talking to Anorexia
programme.desc: Louis Theroux spends time in two of Londons biggest adult eating-disorder treatment facilities. He meets women of all ages and at various stages of their illness, and witnesses the power anorexia holds over them.
